data.title: Like_a_God

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Love this duo, hylos helps leomord charge towards enemies. 

HORSES GOES BRRR

counters.counter_desc: I hate this hero with all my heart, DO NOT CHARGE TOWARDS HER I REPEAT DO NOT CHARGE TOWARDS HER.

dominants.dominant_desc: You can use his first skill to gain movement speed and basic attack your enemy to gain thunder stack and chase enemies. I do this everytime but if you are solo, your allies tend to charge with you thinking you will initiate and clash so do remember that solo players and the enemy can also use their mobility to gain distance so always remember that too.

Ah yes, the most annoying skill for this hero his second skill always activate this skill when charging to enemy heroes in order to stack the reduced movement speed, attack speed and damage of this skill. I can guarantee you that you can melt tank heroes and even deal damage to enemies if you can last longer.

Now for the ult, most people use the ult in the most obvious ways. Remember the enemies can use it for their advantage to. The moment you charge to the enemies their tank might use that opportunity to set and stun your teammates giving them chance to retaliate and you ended up losing.

Just use his ult for chasing, locking down heroes or if the enemy tank is not near.

emblems.emblem_desc: Having extra defense right of the start is good since this hero is not a ranged type and he will always soak up the damage for your team. I use bargain hunter so i could build thunder belt more faster and gain more stacks right of the bat. Concussive blast for extra damage.

equips.equip_desc: The boots for reducing cc. I always build dominance ice for anti life steal and the second build is thunder belt to stack hybrid defense. These 2 are my core items. Clock of destiny in order to stay longer into fights. Guardian helmet for healing overtime and chastise pauldron for enemy marksman and survivability although you can change it to cursed helmet if you want more hp.

hero.hero_overview: Since hylos got a new mythic skin heres some tips when using this hero.
hero.hero_strength: The longer the fight last the more damage he will deal to enemies.
hero.hero_weakness:
This hero doesn't have mobility like a dash skill, this hero only boost movement speed of allies while reducing the enemies movement speed.

I suggest that you only use his ult to chase enemies along side your allies because this hero is not a good setter. Dont use his ult to charge straight to an ixia's ult or other enemy tanks that can set.

spell.spell_desc:
There are two spells that you can use depending on your teammates:

Revitalize:
I suggest this spell if your not solo and make them build the item oracle. This boost your allies chances of survivability.

Vengeance:
I suggest this spell if your solo or have an enemy such as karrie, claude, etc. This is more useful if your team doesn't have coordination or the enemy can shred tanks

dominants.dominant_desc:
Scenario: You're a sidelaner (EXP or Gold, but more common as EXP laner). Both teams play aggressively, 4 vs 4 team fights early in the match on mid lane, in jungle, turtle (opposite side), jungle invasions.

You want to help your team in team fights but the enemy hero on your lane never leaves the lane. The moment I leave, the enemy laner will push turrets, and will continue to push the lane. This sometimes easy goes on past the 10 min mark.

So if I leave the lane, we lose it, quickly until the last one. If I don't leave, I suck at team participation and my team lacks the upper hand they might have had if I had joined the team fights.
dominants.dominant_title: Help the jungler into his buff and our teammates.

hero.hero_overview:
Specialty: Crowd Control / Sustain
Lane: Roam (Tank)
Durability: ★★★★★
Offense: ★★☆☆☆
Control Effect: ★★★★☆
Difficulty: ★★☆☆☆
Hero Description
Hylos is a highly durable tank with strong crowd control and sustainability. His stun, AOE slow, and speed boost make him a great front liner who can initiate and support his team in fights. His ultimate (Glorious Pathway) changes the flow of battles, allowing allies to engage, escape, or reposition easily.
 Sab
hero.hero_strength:
Hylos is one of the tankiest heroes in Mobile Legends, with a strong early game, high sustain, and excellent crowd control. Here are his key strengths:

1. Extremely High Durability
✔ His passive converts Mana into extra HP, making him one of the tankiest heroes in the game.
✔ Can keep casting skills even when out of Mana (uses HP instead).

2. Strong Crowd Control (CC)
✔ Skill 1 (Law and Order) provides a 1-second stun, making it easy to lock down enemies.
✔ Skill 2 (Ring of Punishment) slows enemies and deals continuous magic damage.
✔ Ultimate (Glorious Pathway) slows enemies and speeds up allies, giving a big advantage in fights.

3. Excellent Teamfight Presence
✔ His AOE slow and sustain make him a great frontliner for team fights.
✔ Ultimate helps in both engaging & disengaging, which can turn the tide of battle.

4. Strong in the Early Game
✔ He has high base HP and armor, making him very tanky from level 1.
✔ Can invade enemy jungle or protect allies easily.

5. Good Against Physical Attackers
✔ His Skill 2 reduces enemy attack speed, making it effective against marksmen and fighters.

Want to know his Weaknesses or How to Counter Him?

counters.counter_desc: Karrie's passive skill gives pure damage to the target, where the pure damage itself ignores the enemy's defense so that Hylos is overwhelmed when he meets Karrie.

dominants.dominant_desc: For the early game, try to zone the enemy's gold lane, then join Turle as soon as possible and if you already have an ulti, rotate to the mid or gold lane as soon as possible.

emblems.emblem_desc: Using the tank emblem will really help Hylos because this emblem increases HP and DEF. For the talent emblem itself, here I chose speed and additional armor to be a team shield during war.

equips.equip_desc: With this equipment, Hylos has additional armor and a slow effect and can deal damage with the cursed helmet and clock of destiny.
With this equipment set, Hylos has a lot of additional blood and hybrid defense and is very suitable for late game.

hero.hero_weakness: Because he only has close range skills, Hylos sometimes has a hard time when facing enemies who have long range skills.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: There are no specific heroes, but the best fighters are those with me, as I can take the damage and thus they get a chance to fight. Also, their physical defense is good, so they will not die easily and will cause good damage to the enemy.

dominants.dominant_title: When you reach the fourth level, you can help your team and create fights and initiate them. At the end of the match, be like a real, raging horse, as this hero is very strong at the end of the match

emblems.emblem_desc: These logos help me get durability and speed of movement in the river as well as life points and they are the best in my personal opinion

hero.hero_overview: From the first glance at him, you can be sure of his strength, as his general appearance is sufficient for that. Also, his durability and strength suggest to you that he is a very strong tank, as his presence rate in the high classifications is very large. He is a complete tank, as at the end of the match, his durability and damage are very high.
hero.hero_strength: The power of the killer is very great. You may see how durable it is, but it is not that great, but in the middle and at the end of the match it becomes a raging horse with high durability, high damage, good control effect, and very strong pursuit, as the enemy can rarely escape from you. Also, the ultimate skill is the best thing, as through it the fight begins and through it you get speed for you and your colleague and slows down the enemy. You can also pursue through it.
hero.hero_weakness: The hero is only weak against those who do real damage, such as Lazalzi and Kari. Also, Hylos gets annoyed by Digi and Akai, so just avoid them.

data.recommend: This editing is based on my personal experiences.

spell.spell_desc: I always choose the healing spell as it helps me when entering a fight to survive and my team to survive and provide my team with healing if they need it.

data.title: Hylos simple guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Claude's ability can attack opponents very brutally, this hero has a very large AoE attack which will be helped by Hylos.

With the ultimate Hylos, Claude can attack safely, with this ability it will give Claude the best opportunity to intimidate his opponent.

counters.counter_desc:
Valir has a good crowd control effect. With the Burst Fireball skill, Valir can produce significant burst damage while giving Hylos a 30% slow effect.

Valir has a passive that can stun for 1 second every time he deals 3 stacks of damage.

dominants.dominant_desc:
In the early game, like other tanks, he supports marksman. Even if there are two tanks in the team, he is recommended to be the Mid Laner tank.

If the enemy is ganking, then he can also do a team fight. In fact, use him for early game ganking. Because both skills will slow down the enemy and deal damage, it is very useful in the early game.

He can also do turret diving by activating the ultimate skill, to kill or slow down fleeing enemies with low HP. But try to just slow them down and not start basic attacks, but instead get out of the tower and protect the team's damage dealers.

With the first skill used targeting the opponent's damage dealer which provides crop control, you give the team an advantage in defeating the opponent.

You can pair up with anyone, be it a marksman or a mage or a fighter, but it is important to have a damage dealer with him, because he will give you the opportunity to take out your opponent completely.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Take the Tank Emblem to increase HP, Hybrid Defense, and HP Regen. Vitality, Tenacity, and Concussive Blast are the best talents Hylos can get.

Vitality provides a significant HP boost, which is especially important for tanks like Hylos who often have to be on the front lines in team fights. Extra HP also helps you tank damage and put pressure on enemies early on.

equips.equip_desc: Hylos works well with a mix of durability and consistent damage, and building Thunder Belt first gives you a strong start. The bonus True Damage from Thunder Belt, based on your max HP, makes your early trades more effective, while the slow effect helps you stick to enemies.

hero.hero_overview: Hylos is one of the most feared Tank heroes in Mobile Legends, this hero has Crowd Control skills and very deadly damage. Hylos is the most recommended hero for you to use against Assassin and Fighter heroes who have high levels of agility.
hero.hero_strength:
Hylos' first advantage is that it has high durability, it is recommended to play offensively and not be afraid of death.

The second advantage is the second skill which provides continuous damage and is difficult to avoid.
hero.hero_weakness: The first weakness that the hero Hylos has is that he doesn't have the blink skill. Of the four skills possessed by the hero Hylos, none of them is able to provide a blink effect. Of course, this makes Hylos very slow, very easy for the opponent to lock.

data.recommend: This Hylos tutorial is highly recommended, hit the thumbs up if you like this tutorial.

spell.spell_desc: The recommended battle spell for Hylos in Mobile Legends is Revitalize. Revitalize functions to restore HP around the hero who uses it. This battle spell can be used in the middle of battle to increase endurance.

data.title: Hylos Roam Tutorial
